items.title: US lifts naval blockade as Iran's supreme leader says Trump made deal 'out of desperation'
items.dek: Iran's supreme leader says he disagrees with the deal and Donald Trump signed it "out of desperation".
items.body: Iran's supreme leader says he disagrees with the deal and Donald Trump signed it "out of desperation".

items.title: Obamas host star-studded opening of Chicago presidential centre
items.dek: The campus opens to the public this weekend with a museum, community amenities and more to honour the 44th US president.
items.body: The campus opens to the public this weekend with a museum, community amenities and more to honour the 44th US president.
